title: G Herbo
description: “It's like finding your roots, getting in touch with your old self and that hunger you had when you first started, the energy that made the world fall in love with Lil Herb,” says G Herbo of his new project, Lil Herb. Named after the moniker he broke through with 15 years ago, it’s both an album and a time machine. After helping invent and globalize Chicago drill, launching the Swervin Through Stress nonprofit, and scoring his biggest hit “Went Legit” off his 2024 mixtape Greatest Rapper Alive (13M direct-to-fan streams), Herbo is now reaching back and looking forward. He recorded 100 songs over a year, revisited old favorites, and returned to Chicago studios with his day-ones. The result blends soulful No I.D.-crafted hip hop, menacing drill, and a rare Wyclef Jean feature—plus a reunion with the late Juice WRLD.  “I'm at the finish line… I'm in full control of my destiny now. I've finished the marathon I started when I was 16, when I was Lil Herb.”

title: Keller MX
description:
Bienvenido a Keller MX 🇲🇽, tu canal dedicado a lo mejor de la música mexicana.

Aquí encontrarás letras, éxitos, clásicos y los temas más nuevos del regional mexicano. Aquí están los mejores corridos, banda, norteño, sierreño, rancheras y mucho más.

Suscríbete a Keller MX 🇲🇽 y disfruta de lo mejor de la música mexicana todos los días.
